programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Roger is tormented by a recurring dream; Joan goes to the beach; Don and Ted argue over whose strategy works for margarine.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: The agency works to keep a client; Joan is caught off-guard; Joan and Peggy approach Ted about a new client; Don and Roger leave for Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Betty makes plans for Sally's future; Peggy faces trouble at home; Don and Roger discuss strategy for a big client.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: The partners cannot agree on a new campaign; Don takes a day off; Ken goes hunting with a client; Megan speculates.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Roger denies financial backing to his daughter, Margaret, and her husband; Margaret tells Roger not to come to Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don makes a friend; Joan has drinks with a client; Roger receives a perplexing phone call; Peggy hears new work.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: In a world of jaded billionaires, psychiatrist-gurus, bio-hacked tech bros, AI labs and disillusioned teens being optimized in elite private schools, an audacious data-mining CEO strives to turn insight and influence into profit and power.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Gordon returns to California, in hopes of reconnecting with his brother; Joe uses his leverage to change Wheeler's thinking.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Gordon and Donna keep secrets from each other; Gordon launches a new venture; Cameron's principles are tested.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Cameron and Tom try to come to terms at Mutiny's user picnic; Gordon searches for answers; Joe and Sara leave Dallas.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Reeling after a rival's launch, Mutiny takes measures to ensure survival; Gordon pays a price to quell his paranoia.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: When the Clark family descends into crisis, Gordon helps Joe; Cameron envisions a new future for Mutiny.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank and Lily host the annual English department dinner; Lily has a decision to make; Hank's past involving his troubled relationship with his father catches up to him.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank and Tony travel to an academic conference, where their differing philosophies on work and life cause friction; Lily mediates trouble in Julie and Russell's marriage.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank contends with the return of his father to Railton; Lily hunts for apartments in New York; Julie looks to Hank for help in Lily's absence.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank is faced with an impossible decision at work, as his department's jobs are on the line; Lily settles into a new normal in New York.

programme.title: BlackBerry: The Limited Series
programme.desc: Mike Lazaridis and Doug Fregin pitch their idea of combining a computer with a cellphone to Jim Balsillie; Jim comes on board, and they try to sell their idea.

programme.title: BlackBerry: The Limited Series
programme.desc: BlackBerry hits the market; Mike and Jim try to avoid a hostile takeover; Jim strategizes to increase sales.

programme.title: BlackBerry: The Limited Series
programme.desc: Apple announces the iPhone; Mike scrambles to please Verizon; Jim is unreachable trying to make a personal business deal; the Securities and Exchange Commission investigates the company.

programme.title: Tomorrow You're Gone
programme.desc: A mysterious woman (Michelle Monaghan) helps an ex-convict (Stephen Dorff) after a planned murder goes wrong.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Venice
programme.desc: To get his dog back, private eye Steve Ford forges an unlikely alliance with Spyder, the leader of a local gang. With help from his best friend, Steve pulls out the big guns to retrieve Spyder's missing cash and cocaine and save his beloved pooch.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: In a world of jaded billionaires, psychiatrist-gurus, bio-hacked tech bros, AI labs and disillusioned teens being optimized in elite private schools, an audacious data-mining CEO strives to turn insight and influence into profit and power.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Peggy gets flowers at the office; Pete wades through new business politics; Joan faces an awkward situation.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don takes an unexpected trip; Betty dines with a friend; Harry promotes a cause; the partners consider an asset.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Sterling Cooper & Partners prepares for a guest; Don contacts an old friend; Roger deals with problems at home; Peggy is underestimated.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don receives a visitor from his past; Stan embarrasses a superior; Ginsberg gets help from Peggy with a problem; Harry finds a new ally.
